Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Decompose the problem into a set of distinct, non-overlapping subproblems that, when solved, provide all necessary components for the final solution. Each helper should be assigned a single, focused task that addresses a specific algorithmic or mathematical requirement of the problem. Ensure that the helpers' outputs are sufficient for the parent to synthesize the final answer. Do not restate the problem; instead, define the tasks based on the input data provided in the question.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",

  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B2-usaco-2023-us-open-gold-tree-merging
Title: B2. USACO 2023 US Open Gold / Tree Merging

Problem:
Reconstruct a valid sequence of sibling-merge operations that transforms an initial rooted tree into a final rooted tree.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
